mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.MEMBERID) FROM TBL_MEMBER m JOIN TBL_COMPANY c ON m.MEMBERID = c.FK_MEMBERID
m.TYPE = 1
AND ( c.COMPANY_NAME LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR c.BIZ_NO LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' )
AND m.STATUS = #{status}
AND c.APPROVED_YN = CASE #{approval} WHEN 'APPROVED' THEN 1 WHEN 'REJECTED' THEN 2 WHEN 'PENDING' THEN 0 END
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_COMPANY SET APPROVED_YN = CASE #{approvedYn} WHEN 'APPROVED' THEN 1 WHEN 'REJECTED' THEN 2 WHEN 'PENDING' THEN 0 END, APPROVAL_AT = SYSDATE WHERE FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId}

UPDATE TBL_COMPANY SET APPROVED_YN = CASE #{approvedYn} WHEN 'APPROVED' THEN 1 WHEN 'REJECTED' THEN 2 WHEN 'PENDING' THEN 0 END, REJECT_REASON = #{rejectReason}, APPROVAL_AT = SYSDATE WHERE FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId}
UPDATE TBL_MEMBER SET STATUS = CASE #{status} WHEN 'SUSPENDED' THEN 0 WHEN 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 WHEN 'WITHDRAWN' THEN 2 END, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE MEMBERID = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_MEMBER_AUTHORITY (AUTH_NUM, FK_MEMBERID, AUTHORITY) VALUES (SEQ_MEMBER_AUTHORITY_AUTH_NUM.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, 'ROLE_COMPANY')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_MEMBER_AUTHORITY WHERE FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId} AND AUTHORITY = 'ROLE_COMPANY'
mapper.select: SELECT m.MEMBERID AS memberId, c.COMPANY_NAME AS companyName, c.BIZ_NO AS bizNo, c.INDUSTRY_CODE AS industryCode, c.CEO_NAME AS ceoName, c.ZIP_CODE AS zipCode, c.ADDR1 AS addr1, c.ADDR2 AS addr2, m.STATUS AS status, CASE c.APPROVED_YN WHEN 0 THEN 'PENDING' WHEN 1 THEN 'APPROVED' WHEN 2 THEN 'REJECTED' END AS approvedYn, c.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason, c.APPROVAL_AT AS approvalAt, m.CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM TBL_MEMBER m JOIN TBL_COMPANY c ON m.MEMBERID = c.FK_MEMBERID WHERE m.MEMBERID = #{memberId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_COMPANY SET BIZ_NO = #{bizNo}, CEO_NAME = #{ceoName}, INDUSTRY_CODE = #{industryCode}, COMPANY_NAME = #{companyName} WHERE FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId}
